chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. D 218 of 2025 _____________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.1090/2025 2. For orders on Misc. No.1091/2025 3. For orders on Misc. No.1092/2025 4. For hearing of main case 21.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Din Qazi, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-4. Matter pertains to show cause notice pursuant to suspension. Admittedly, pre suspension notice was issued. Post suspension, show cause notice has also been issued. Reply is stated to have been filed and the decision is awaited. Under such circumstances, while adequate remedy is being availed no case is made out to entertain this petition. The instant petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
